title: Red social para ofrecer o demandar servicios
body: [![](http://qapacity.com/images/logo-big.png)](http://qapacity.com/)[](http://qapacity.com/) [**Qapacity**](http://qapacity.com/), *a social application that connects the needs of clients and professionals offering services*. I have registered and here you can see my [professional account](http://qapacity.com/es/users/adria-julia-lundgren/), and although it doesn't have much activity yet, it looks very good. It goes beyond networks like LinkedIn, Xing or Infojobs since in this one, as a professional, you can offer your services one by one, specifying, adding description and tags. It is still private beta, if you want an invitation just ask me for it.
